title: celmisia semicordata subsp. semicordata
intro: Celmisia semicordata subsp. semicordata, also known as the New Zealand Mountain Daisy, is a plant species native to New Zealand, characterized by its white or pink daisy-like flowers and silver-green foliage. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Maori medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Celmisia semicordata subsp. semicordata include reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be harnessed and utilized for therapeutic purposes.
